title: odina rubra
intro: Odina rubra, also known as Devil's Club, is a woody shrub native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Odina rubra include its high content of isopropyl and isobutyl esters, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Odina rubra include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Odina rubra is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
